case_title: ANDREW STEINFELD VS. BEST BUY CO., INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE: NATIONAL REGISTERED AGENTS, INC.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEINFELD, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. VOICEMAIL MESSAGE FROM PLAINTIFF RECIEVED ON 1-13-22 STATING THAT A SETTLEMENT HAD BEEN REACHED IN THIS MATTER. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $277.50 FILED BY STEINFELD, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY CO., INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
